name: Raspberry Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt) in a large bowl.
3. Stir in the raspberries and water until just combined.
4. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead gently until it is smooth and holds together.
5. Roll the dough to be about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut into triangles using a sharp knife or pizza cutter.
7. Bake for 10 minutes in the preheated oven, or until golden brown.
Makes 36 servings.
